Name: International Community School Zurich
Tagline: Discover The Inter-Community School Zurich. ICS is a renowned international school in Zurich, Switzerland. As an IB school, ICS offers personalised education in English for Preschool & Kindergarten th
About: At ICS, we are committed to providing a supportive and enabling learning environment in which all members of the community are challenged to achieve their individual potential, encouraged to pursue their passions, and expected to fulfil their responsibilities Discover the oldest international school in the Greater Zurich Area. Learn about our school leadership team, and their commitment to supporting students.
Philosophy: After a five-year follow-up visit in January 2012, the Council of International Schools (CIS) and the New England Association of Schools & Colleges (NEASC) agreed that ICS should continue its good standing as an accredited school for a further five years. ICS then received confirmation of re-accreditation by CIS and NEASC and the International Baccalaureate Organization (IBO) in January 2017.
Outcomes: Graduates from the International Community School Zurich consistently gain admission to prestigious universities worldwide, including those in Switzerland and the UK. The school's IB Diploma results are above the global average, reflecting strong academic performance.
Admissions: We are happy your family is about to take the first step in becoming part of the ICS community. Our Admissions Team is here to help guide you through the application process and make it as easy as possible.
Quote: Empowering each learner to reach their potential, pursue their passions, and embrace their global responsibilities.

Performance.Academic Integration: Our teachers believe that students learn best when given the opportunity to engage in meaningful learning experiences and make personal connections to content. In our curriculum, students strike a balance between learning through inquiry versus acquiring skills and knowledge.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: At ICS, there is not a ‘one size fits all’ approach to teaching and learning. Supported by structured inquiry at school - and urged to undertake authentic learning activities at home - students are encouraged to develop the attributes and skills associated with self-directed learners.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: ICS offers the curriculum of the International Baccalaureate (IB) programme for all grade levels. The International Baccalaureate (IB) Programme is highly regarded throughout the world.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: We are pleased to share with our community, and those who wish to join it, the path for the transformation of our campus, and in so doing invite you to walk with us, into our tomorrow.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: We are a school that prides itself on our openness and our acceptance. We welcome visitors to our campus, those who are prospective parents and those who are interested in learning about our exceptional curriculum.
Performance.Coaching Credentials: Our community is delighted to welcome Ms Lynda Miller as the new Primary School Principal at ICS. With over 30 years of international experience, Lynda brings deep expertise in inquiry-driven, inclusive education that nurtures curiosity, kindness, and connection.
